name: run_scenario
_note: worldmodel.run_scenario (LENS_ACTIONS handler). Forward simulation: nv = v*(1+g) + Σ(neighbour * weight * 0.1), with g clamped to [-0.5,0.5], step count clamped to [1,60], and EVERY value clamped to ±VALUE_CAP (1e12) so the trajectory is ALWAYS finite even for a 1e308 seed — fail-CLOSED magnitude bound (pinned by the numeric-guard suite in server/tests/worldmodel-lens-macros.test.js). With no entities the macro fail-CLOSES to ok:false 'no entities to simulate' rather than fabricating a trajectory — hence both fuzz cases expect ok:false (the assassin's owner actor has an empty world model). LENS_ACTIONS-served; not driven by the MACROS-only assassin.
